hook: A client came to us drowning in manual ops and skeptical it could change.
conflict: But every tool they tried just added more dashboards to babysit.
lesson: We learned that the win was removing decisions, not adding features.
transformation: Now their team ships in a day what used to take a month.
why_it_matters: We learned that the win was removing decisions, not adding features.
cta: Book a call to see if we can do the same for you.
